fails.why: No module-level doc comment (what + how); function comments are terse labels.
Comments still describe mechanics (validate user, verify stock, create order), not consequences.
big_orders table and 1000 threshold used with no explanation of the large-order domain concept.
Comments remain terse mechanical labels (// Verify stock availability, // Create order record).
Early returns (L162, L202) and continue (L141) have no 'why' justification.
updateUserCache (L214-217) sets cache with no comment on what the next caller sees.
return order/user/{processed,total} have no doc of what the caller should do with them.
LARGE_ORDER_THRESHOLD=1000 (L160) named but no comment explaining why 1000.
handleOrderData has only line comments, no JSDoc block with @example + return value.
Function still named handleOrderData — banned words 'handle' and 'data' retained (L226).
cache.set (L216) has no corresponding cache.get; read/write pairing not consistent.
isUrgent and shouldNotifyCustomer remain boolean params that branch internal behavior (createOrder L186, sendConfirmation L202); not split into separate functions.
let total=0; total+=amount and processed.push mutate accumulator/array inside loop (L137,L147-148).
verifyStock awaits db.query sequentially inside a for loop (L98-109); no Promise.all.
db, cache, mailer still hardcoded global imports (L1-3); no factory/injection.
validateOrder(order: any) (L342) and reducer (item: any) (L352) still use any; status is bare string (L66).
Discount codes (L25-28) and threshold (L160) still hardcoded in module body, not externalized to config.
No rejection of empty items / negative qty at boundary (silent continue L141); uses banned || 0 / || '' fallbacks (L135).
Still throws everywhere (L106,120,123,271,281,348,357); no Result type.
throw new Error('insufficient_stock') etc. are bare strings with no cause/context.
status (L66) and priority (L68) typed as bare string, not union types.
Inputs accepted without parsing into typed domain objects at boundary; validateOrder takes any.
No timeout on any db.query / mailer.send call.
Bare new Error('user_not_found'); no { type, code, status, detail } structure.
Returns OrderRecord = raw DB row shape (user_id, item_count) spread from result.rows[0]; no DTO mapping.
Exports not consolidated at top; handleOrderData/removeCartItem mid-file (L226,L261), private helpers after exports (L304-361).
order.customer.address.street/.city/.zip chains remain (L335-336, L346, L360).
validateOrder mixes validation with low-level string formatting (toFixed template literal L360).
removeCartItem still throws 'item_not_in_cart' (L281) instead of succeeding idempotently.
if (total<=0) still throws (L357), no Result, no comment documenting the invariant.
No ASCII diagram of the multi-step pipeline; only prose line comments.
getInstanceConfig comment (L10) still anchors to 'admin dashboard' caller, forbidden by assertion.
Order fulfillment, document formatting, shipping, validation still colocated in one file.
